name: Regretful business
description:
"I have to… focus on anything except that night”

Congrats, you slept with your boss. After a friendly interaction and a few too many shots of tequila, a rather intimate situation resulted from it. Now, realizing he has slept with someone who works for him, he has seemed distant.
